nasb.text: Because of the tender mercy of our God, With which the Sunrise from on high will visit us,

esv.text: because of the tender mercy of our God, whereby the sunrise shall visit us  from on high

cnv.text: 因我們　神的憐憫， 使清晨的陽光從高天臨到我們，

ccb.text: 由于上帝的怜悯， 清晨的曙光必从高天普照我们，

csbs.text: 因着我们神怜悯的心肠， 黎明的曙光将从高天临到我们，
